Hello, world!

03 Jul 2014

Welcome to my blog on GitHub pages. I hope to update this as soon as i am able to release new content on GitHub.

Current ideas

MMX-Info

A data-mining tool for the great game "Might and Magic X - Legacy". The game data is delivered mostly as xml and csv files. The project's goal ist to parse that data and transform it into a human readable form.

This will be most likely be a python module to include in your own code.

RP-Codex

As I'm a passionate pen-and-paper roleplaying gamer, and our party is quite well equipped with modern handheld devices in real life, I seek for a solution to take character sheets and rule hints on a mobile level.

This will be most likely a full featured web application.
